evidence.velocity_vs_rigour: Structured and analytical manner with emphasis on data quality
evidence.domain_risk: Create Power BI dashboards and reports for monitoring and decision-making
evidence.data_team_maturity: Develop and implement a unified sustainability data platform integrating multiple sources
evidence.jd_authorship: Design and operate scalable data pipelines within Microsoft Fabric; Gather requirements and translate them into effective reporting and analytics solutions
evidence.stakeholder_orientation: Develop and implement a unified sustainability data platform integrating multiple sources
evidence.autonomy_level: Gather requirements and translate them into effective reporting and analytics solutions
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix: Develop and implement a unified sustainability data platform integrating multiple sources; Improve data management processes
evidence.greenfield_vs_fix_explanation: Developing a unified platform integrating multiple sources is new-build work, while improving data management processes reflects fix/scale of existing operations, making this mixed.
evidence.ai_role: Design and operate scalable data pipelines within Microsoft Fabric
evidence.ai_role_explanation: The JD describes standard BI/data pipeline work in Microsoft Fabric and Power BI with no reference to AI coding tools or AI-consuming data infrastructure.
evidence.testing_framing: Structured and analytical manner with emphasis on data quality
evidence.testing_framing_explanation: Data quality is stated as a desired trait or value without an ownership verb ('own', 'ensure', 'define') or named testing practice, so it reads as absent rather than an owned responsibility.
evidence.loss_aversion_framing_explanation: The core responsibilities focus on platform-building and dashboarding for decision-making, with no incident, SLO, compliance, or audit language despite EUDR compliance appearing only as a bonus skill.
evidence.velocity_vs_rigour_explanation: Only rigour signals present (data quality emphasis, data modeling); no velocity language.
evidence.domain_risk_explanation: The role focuses on internal analytics and reporting for business decision-making without explicit financial reporting or regulatory compliance as core responsibilities, despite EUDR compliance appearing only as a bonus skill.
evidence.data_team_maturity_explanation: The emphasis on developing and implementing a unified platform while operating within established tools (Microsoft Fabric, Power BI) signals an existing data function with infrastructure that is growing and scaling.
evidence.jd_authorship_explanation: The JD combines technical specificity about platforms (Microsoft Fabric) with generic recruiter-style action verbs (gather requirements, translate solutions), indicating mixed authorship.
evidence.stakeholder_orientation_explanation: The role focuses on building data infrastructure and dashboards for internal sustainability monitoring and decision-making rather than serving commercial, product, finance, or external audiences.
evidence.autonomy_level_explanation: The primary verbs (gather, create, contribute, translate) indicate responsive execution of others' requirements rather than strategic direction-setting.
